estimates.rationale: Foundational: full layering (models/repo/service/boundary) plus SPA home grid + SKU detail route with empty state.
Write path with (sku,location) unique constraint refused at write time, plus form with inline validation.
Single mutation on existing model: adjust quantity with never-below-zero rule and in-place optimistic row update.
New receipt behavior with supplier reference raising stock, plus receipt form and confirmation flow.
Outbound pick drawing stock down with write-time overcommit refusal (R2) and inline shortfall messaging.
